# daytona_link_account (Action)

Links a secondary account to the authenticated Daytona user.

## Example Usage

```terraform
action "daytona_link_account" "example" {
  config {
    account_provider = "github"
    provider_user_id = "provider-user-id"
  }
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_provider` (String) Daytona account provider name for the secondary account, such as a value returned by the `daytona_account_providers` data source.
- `provider_user_id` (String) Provider-specific user ID for the secondary account.
